EN ES
Minca · Sierra Nevada · Colombia

The river speaks before anything else.

Then the birds, and the terrace looking straight at the water leaves you there, with nothing left to do.

Message us on WhatsApp See the lodge →
Nightly rates ▾
Two people · $260.000Three people · $340.000

A two-room refuge in the Sierra Nevada. There's no agenda here: the water runs, the fire burns, the sauna's steam loosens you, the hammock waits. Getting here isn't the hard part. Accepting that nothing is missing — that is.

The lodge

What's already here

Nothing to add. Just there to use.

Private river

Not a photo of the river. The river itself, right down the steps from the room.

Steam

Dry heat. The body gives in before it asks to.

Included if you book directly with us. $60.000 COP if you arrive via Airbnb or Booking.

Bonfire

Lit every night, no fixed time: if dinner runs long, the fire waits. No one puts it out early.

Wood-fired oven

Bread or pizza, if you give us time. The oven takes almost three hours to heat, and that's part of the rhythm here too.

Nature

Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta all around, in every direction.

Internet

Wifi in common areas. It doesn't reach the rooms.

Nearby

Around the lodge

Things that exist nearby, and who to call if you want them.

Birdwatching

With Otto, from Nuwabirdlife. Arranged directly at the lodge.

Ask at the lodge

Yoga

Book a day in advance. The instructor may vary depending on availability.

Ask at the lodge
Gallery

Gallery

The place, as it is.

Exterior view of the lodge cabin surrounded by forest
Clean river flowing with stones near the lodge
Exterior view of the wooden sauna building
Night bonfire lit on the path
The spaces

Five spaces, one rhythm

Two rooms, a refuge, the fire, the kitchen.

Río Room

1 double bed · 1 single bed

The river as the backdrop for the whole night. The screen door lets it in; the glass one switches it off. You choose what sound you sleep with.

Fuego Room

1 double bed · 1 single bed

The same terrace facing the water, the same river below. The name already says what changes.

El Refugio

One level down, closer to the river. Hammocks, quiet, and nothing else to ask for.

El Fuego

The path down to the river. Where the nights end.

Shared kitchen

Separate from the grill and the wood-fired oven. Everything in its place.

Location

Where it is

Real travel times. No embellishment.

Approximate Travel Times

From Travel Time
Minca Town 5-minute walk
Santa Marta 45 minutes
Santa Marta Airport (SMR) 1 hour
Palomino 2 hours

On foot from the lodge, the town is close. You can walk in any direction; the road to the waterfalls starts right here.

Who it's for

Who this is for

And who it isn't.

Couples & Solitude

Two rooms, one river. There's no third option.

Slow Nomads

No wifi in the room. Here you don't work, you stop.

Slow travelers

Already knows Minca from the reviews. Looking for what almost no one promises and delivers: real quiet, and birds before sunrise.

No fine print

What's included, what's not

Everything said before you book.

✓ What is Included

  • Nightly bonfire, part of the stay
  • Direct river access
  • Wifi in common areas
  • Sauna, if you book directly with us

✗ What is NOT Included

  • Sauna with additional $60.000 COP cost, if booking via Airbnb or Booking
  • Wood-fired oven (advance notice, nearly three hours)
  • Breakfast (extra cost, or nearby restaurant recommendations)
  • Organized activities or agenda
  • Wifi in the rooms
Common Questions

Common questions

The ones people ask before booking.

How many people fit? +

Two rooms. That's the answer, and the policy.

Is there wifi in the rooms? +

No. Wifi is in the common areas.

Can I request something from the wood-fired oven? +

Yes, with advance notice. It takes almost three hours to be ready.

What's the cancellation policy? +

A 30% deposit secures the booking. Cancel up to a week before the date and it's refunded. After that, the date is rescheduled, with up to six months' flexibility.

What should I bring? +

Repellent, light comfortable clothing. If you plan to hike, proper hiking shoes.

Do you accept pets? +

By special request, and under a commitment to cover any damages.

Can I smoke? +

Not inside the rooms.

Is breakfast included? +

Not by default. It has an additional cost, or we recommend a couple of nearby restaurants for breakfast.

Does the sauna cost extra? +

If you book directly with us, it's included. If you come through Airbnb or Booking, there's an additional $60.000 COP cost.

Guests

Unedited.

Honey was very attentive and took great care of us. 10/10 (translated from Spanish)
